distribution.name: distribution
distribution.description: a*(b+c) = a*b + a*c — one op distributes over another

commutativity.name: commutativity
commutativity.description: op(a, b) = op(b, a) — order doesn't matter

identity.name: identity
identity.description: op(x, e) = x where e is the identity element

annihilation.name: annihilation
annihilation.description: op(x, z) = z where z absorbs everything

evaluation.name: evaluation
evaluation.description: op(c1, c2) = c3 — compute concrete values

cancellation.name: cancellation
cancellation.description: (x + c) - c = x — inverse ops cancel
